description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests Runner that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Linux and macOS, and one for Windows. The Linux and macOS job should use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12, while the Windows job should test on windows-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12. Each job should check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, build, and test with pytest.
